subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, thy letter was received and forthwith is a reply being penned, that past delays may be remedied, O esteemed one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید فورا جواب مرقوم میگردد تا تلافی مافات شود ای جناب
subcodes.subjects: @wealth inequality and its moderation, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
